ToolboxElements.Name: Date (German) – dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm:ss
ToolboxElements.Description: Date/time format commonly used in Germany (24-hour clock).

ToolboxElements.Name: Date (US) – MM/dd/yyyy hh:mm:sszzz
ToolboxElements.Description: US-style date with 12-hour clock and time zone offset.

ToolboxElements.Name: ISO 8601 (Round-trip) – o
ToolboxElements.Description: Round-trip date/time pattern, preserves full precision (e.g., 2025-08-26T12:34:56.7890123Z).

ToolboxElements.Name: Date Only – yyyy-MM-dd
ToolboxElements.Description: Date-only ISO-like pattern (useful for filenames and logs).

ToolboxElements.Name: Invariant Date with Time Zone
ToolboxElements.Description: ISO-like date/time including time zone information.

ToolboxElements.Name: Integer (No Grouping)
ToolboxElements.Description: Formats integral values without thousand separators.

ToolboxElements.Name: Integer (Grouped)
ToolboxElements.Description: Formats integral values with thousand separators.

ToolboxElements.Name: Integer (Zero-Padded, 6 digits)
ToolboxElements.Description: Left-pads integers with zeros to 6 digits (e.g., 42 → 000042).

ToolboxElements.Name: Number (2 Decimals)
ToolboxElements.Description: Fixed-point with exactly two decimal places.

ToolboxElements.Name: Number (Up to 3 Decimals)
ToolboxElements.Description: Up to three decimal places (trailing zeros suppressed).

ToolboxElements.Name: Number (Grouped, 2 Decimals)
ToolboxElements.Description: Thousand separators with two decimal places.

ToolboxElements.Name: Currency (Culture-aware) – C
ToolboxElements.Description: Currency format with symbol and decimals per current culture.
